title: AquaSensei Telemetry v1
description: Canonical device-to-cloud telemetry contract for the AquaSensei platform. Units are baked into the key names (temp_f, alk_dkh, ...) so there is no ambiguity. Known parameters and source types are enumerated to catch drift: to add a parameter or a source shape, add it here and bump the contract version. Firmware serializes to this; the app validates every inbound MQTT payload against it at the ingest boundary and rejects anything off-contract.

schema.description: Contract version tag. The app routes by this value.

client_id.description: Device MQTT clientId: 'pr-' + lowercase STA MAC, no colons.

device_type.description: Device model. Free string so adding a new device of an existing shape does not bump the contract. Known values: trident, desktop7, roller_mat, monitor.

ts.description: Unix epoch seconds from the device clock (NTP-synced).

sources.description: One entry per data source the device carries. Single-source devices (Trident) send one entry; aggregators (desktop7) send several.

type.description: Source shape. Adding a new shape is a contract change: add it here and bump the version.

origin.description: Demo/simulator sources MUST be tagged 'sim'. The cloud rejects sim telemetry; it must never be ingested as real.

readings.description: Known parameters only, units in the key. Omit a key rather than sending a zero/placeholder. To add a parameter, add it here and bump the version.
